creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
www/py-html5lib is only a BUILD_DEPENDS for www/qt[56]-webengine, so they should still build fine in a clean environment. Since www/py-html5lib-modern claims to be a drop-in replacement, it seems like a treewide switch should happen, but I haven't done any testing with the new port.

sunpoet: What is your plan with this? It seems, at the very least, CONFLICTS_INSTALL should be added to both py-html5lib ports.
